name: Svartalfheim Discoveries
description: Dwarven masterworks and dark elf traps.

results.text: Dwarven Forge: Tools and half-completed weapon. Reactivating might trigger a trap.
Vein of Gleaming Ore: Mining yields valuable trade materials. May draw Dokkalfar.
Crystalised Cave: Precious stones guarded by Crystal Spiders.
Forgotten Vault: Sealed by Runes. Riches guarded by Rock Golems.
Dvalin's Workshop: Cursed artefacts. Test Wits DR14 to handle safely.
Collapsed Mine: Tremors rock the tunnels. Hide lost artefacts.
